description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic on the front, drawstring on the waist and raglan sleevesWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitGet ready to hang out with all your guy buddies in this red tee from the Graphic collection from jealous 21. The graphic with the super cute boy-girl glitter print is at once cute and cool. Team this with faded jeans, shorts or a super cute denim mini skirt and stylish footwear from myntra's wide catalogue for that instant cool.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.8", Chest-33"
